category_sources: Official HTTPie CLI docs cover terminal HTTP request usage.
source_facts.description identifies HTTPie as a user-friendly cURL replacement and command-line HTTP client.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs brand the product as HTTPie.
docs_sources: Official source_facts.homepage is https://httpie.io/ and the official CLI documentation is https://httpie.io/docs/cli.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/httpie/cli; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official docs describe CLI usage for HTTP requests, JSON, forms, headers, authentication, redirects, proxies, and sessions.
source_facts.description says command-line HTTP client and cURL replacement.
